message:
fix(nix): use go mod edit instead of sed for version patching

Cherry-picked from PR #2512 (MelsovCOZY). The go mod edit approach is
cleaner and more correct than sed for modifying go.mod.

Co-authored-by: Melsov Yernur <MelsovCOZY@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -22,7 +22,7 @@ buildGoModule {
   # patch release, and GOTOOLCHAIN=auto can't download in the Nix sandbox.
   postPatch = ''
     goVer="$(go env GOVERSION | sed 's/^go//')"
-    sed -i "s/^go .*/go $goVer/" go.mod
+    go mod edit -go="$goVer"
   '';
 
   # Allow patch-level toolchain upgrades when a dependency's minimum Go patch
